fields.label: Please tell us how you heard about this opportunity.
fields.card_text: How did you hear about this opportunity?

fields.label: What has been your favorite project or proudest accomplishment? Why?
fields.source: no LABEL_RULES match for label='What has been your favorite project or proudest accomplishment? Why?'

fields.label: Why do you want to work at Palantir?
fields.value:
I'm excited about the opportunity to work at Palantir Technologies because I'm drawn to organizations that operate at scale, solve complex technical challenges, and prioritize innovation and long-term impact. Throughout my experience at Microsoft and Amazon Robotics, I've enjoyed working at the intersection of technology, operations, and strategy — leading cross-functional initiatives, building scalable systems, and driving measurable business outcomes.

What particularly interests me about Palantir Technologies is the opportunity to contribute to high-impact products and programs while collaborating with talented teams across engineering, product, and business functions. I'm especially motivated by environments where I can combine technical depth with program leadership to improve reliability, automation, and operational efficiency.

In my current role, I've led large-scale resilience and automation initiatives, developed AI-driven workflow solutions, and managed complex cross-organizational programs under executive visibility. I enjoy taking ambiguous problems, creating structure, and driving execution from concept through delivery. I'd be excited to bring that same mindset to Palantir Technologies while continuing to grow in a fast-paced and innovative environment.

Beyond the technical challenges, I'm also looking for a company whose culture emphasizes ownership, collaboration, and continuous improvement. From what I've seen, Palantir Technologies aligns strongly with those values, which makes the opportunity especially compelling to me.

fields.label: As part of our interview process, we may use AI notetakers to transcribe conversations for accuracy and efficiency. Please see our candidate privacy policy for more information on how we process your data. Your decision to opt in or out of this tooling will not impact your candidacy.
